file.content:
# Basic web application: gateway -> service -> database + cache + object storage.
# Demonstrates: core kinds, inline relationships, profiles as environments, outputs.
apiVersion: iap.dev/v1

metadata:
  name: basic-webapp
  description: A small storefront web application
  owner: team-web
  organization: example-corp
  labels:
    costCenter: "cc-142"

profiles:
  development:
    description: Small, cheap, single-zone
    overrides:
      resources:
        web:
          spec:
            size: xs
            scaling: { min: 1, max: 1 }
        orders-db:
          spec:
            availability: standard
            capacity: { storage: 5Gi }
            resilience: { backup: none }
  production:
    description: Highly available production environment
    overrides:
      resources:
        web:
          spec:
            size: l
            availability: high
            scaling: { min: 2, max: 6 }
        orders-db:
          spec:
            availability: high

resources:
  edge:
    kind: Gateway
    description: Public entry point
    spec:
      exposure: public
      domains: [shop.example.com]
      tls:
        minimumVersion: "1.3"
    relationships:
      - type: routesTo
        target: web
        protocol: https
        path: /

  web:
    kind: Service
    description: Storefront HTTP service
    labels:
      tier: application
    spec:
      artifact:
        type: container-image
        reference: registry.example.com/storefront:1.4.2
      size: m
      exposure: internal
      availability: standard
      ports:
        - name: http
          port: 8080
          protocol: http
      healthCheck:
        path: /healthz
        port: 8080
        interval: 30s
      scaling:
        min: 1
        max: 4
        targetUtilization: 70
    relationships:
      - type: connectsTo
        target: orders-db
        port: 5432
        protocol: tcp
        access: read-write
      - type: connectsTo
        target: session-cache
        port: 6379
        protocol: tcp
        access: read-write
      - type: storesDataIn
        target: assets
        access: read-write
      - type: authenticatedBy
        target: web-identity

  orders-db:
    kind: Database
    description: Primary order store
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      class: relational
      engine: postgresql
      engineVersion: "16"
      availability: standard
      encryption:
        atRest: required
        inTransit: required
      capacity:
        storage: 20Gi
      resilience:
        backup: required
        recoveryPointObjective: 1d
        recoveryTimeObjective: 4h

  session-cache:
    kind: Cache
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      engine: redis-compatible
      capacity:
        memory: 1Gi

  assets:
    kind: ObjectStore
    description: Product images and static assets
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      versioning: enabled
      exposure: private

  web-identity:
    kind: Identity
    description: Workload identity for the storefront service
    spec:
      type: workload

  storefront-app:
    kind: Application
    spec:
      components: [edge, web, orders-db, session-cache, assets]
      version: "1.4.2"

outputs:
  site:
    resource: edge
    attribute: endpoint
    description: Public URL of the storefront
  db-connection:
    resource: orders-db
    attribute: connectionSecret
    description: Handle to the database connection secret

input.document:
# Basic web application: gateway -> service -> database + cache + object storage.
# Demonstrates: core kinds, inline relationships, profiles as environments, outputs.
apiVersion: iap.dev/v1

metadata:
  name: basic-webapp
  description: A small storefront web application
  owner: team-web
  organization: example-corp
  labels:
    costCenter: "cc-142"

profiles:
  development:
    description: Small, cheap, single-zone
    overrides:
      resources:
        web:
          spec:
            size: xs
            scaling: { min: 1, max: 1 }
        orders-db:
          spec:
            availability: standard
            capacity: { storage: 5Gi }
            resilience: { backup: none }
  production:
    description: Highly available production environment
    overrides:
      resources:
        web:
          spec:
            size: l
            availability: high
            scaling: { min: 2, max: 6 }
        orders-db:
          spec:
            availability: high

resources:
  edge:
    kind: Gateway
    description: Public entry point
    spec:
      exposure: public
      domains: [shop.example.com]
      tls:
        minimumVersion: "1.3"
    relationships:
      - type: routesTo
        target: web
        protocol: https
        path: /

  web:
    kind: Service
    description: Storefront HTTP service
    labels:
      tier: application
    spec:
      artifact:
        type: container-image
        reference: registry.example.com/storefront:1.4.2
      size: m
      exposure: internal
      availability: standard
      ports:
        - name: http
          port: 8080
          protocol: http
      healthCheck:
        path: /healthz
        port: 8080
        interval: 30s
      scaling:
        min: 1
        max: 4
        targetUtilization: 70
    relationships:
      - type: connectsTo
        target: orders-db
        port: 5432
        protocol: tcp
        access: read-write
      - type: connectsTo
        target: session-cache
        port: 6379
        protocol: tcp
        access: read-write
      - type: storesDataIn
        target: assets
        access: read-write
      - type: authenticatedBy
        target: web-identity

  orders-db:
    kind: Database
    description: Primary order store
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      class: relational
      engine: postgresql
      engineVersion: "16"
      availability: standard
      encryption:
        atRest: required
        inTransit: required
      capacity:
        storage: 20Gi
      resilience:
        backup: required
        recoveryPointObjective: 1d
        recoveryTimeObjective: 4h

  session-cache:
    kind: Cache
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      engine: redis-compatible
      capacity:
        memory: 1Gi

  assets:
    kind: ObjectStore
    description: Product images and static assets
    labels:
      tier: data
    spec:
      versioning: enabled
      exposure: private

  web-identity:
    kind: Identity
    description: Workload identity for the storefront service
    spec:
      type: workload

  storefront-app:
    kind: Application
    spec:
      components: [edge, web, orders-db, session-cache, assets]
      version: "1.4.2"

outputs:
  site:
    resource: edge
    attribute: endpoint
    description: Public URL of the storefront
  db-connection:
    resource: orders-db
    attribute: connectionSecret
    description: Handle to the database connection secret
